_comment: Axe WCAG-A/AA violation-node counts per page-state per rule id. RATCHET (mirrors consoleBaseline.json): counts may only go DOWN. `npm run test:a11y` prints the suggested lower baseline when a state improves, and prints seed counts for any state with no entry here (e.g. reader-footnote-open, which needs a footnote-bearing E2E_READER_BOOK). A state with no key is report-only. Raising a number is a deliberate, reviewer-visible decision. Regenerate the blob with: node tests/e2e/scripts/merge-a11y-report.mjs. Baseline seeded 2026-07-05 against E2E_READER_BOOK=book_1778118568525.
